typical_relief_triggers: Safe zone moments between combat segments
typical_tension_triggers: Specialized sequence transitions (jet pack, hand-to-hand combat)
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Mission-based segment pacing with narrative breaks; alternates between action sequences and story exposition via in-game news broadcasts

difficulty_curve.early_game: Introduction to platforming and shooting mechanics in tandem
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Integration of mission objectives (hostage rescue) with combat; introduction of specialized abilities (jet pack)
difficulty_curve.late_game: Hand-to-hand combat sequences and robot ninja boss battle; compounded mechanical complexity
notable_spikes: Jet pack sequence (requires vertical navigation mastery)

notable_level_patterns.description: Game composed of five distinct gameplay segments (driving, shooting/hostage rescue, hand-to-hand combat, jet pack, boss battle) that can be played as standalone arcade missions or sequentially in Movie Adventure mode
News broadcast segments between levels advance story and provide pacing relief from continuous action
In Movie Adventure mode, player can choose mission order (except final boss); mission completion affects enemy behavior and plot branching
